info.title: 默认模块
info.description:
OpenAPI specification generated from Novada Scraper API documentation.

All scraping operations are submitted as `POST` requests to the same endpoint `https://scraper.novada.com/request` using `application/x-www-form-urlencoded` bodies. Each distinct scraping operation is identified by its `scraper_id` value. Because every operation targets the same real path, operations are listed under pseudo-paths of the form `/request#<scraper_id>`; the real request path is always `/request` (see the `x-actual-path` field on each path).

Authentication uses a Bearer API key in the `Authorization` header.
